'''''Tharen''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in the service of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. One of its [[Gunner/Legends|gunnery]] mates was [[Kesin Ommis/Legends|Kesin Ommis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
